'''Larin Vost''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was the head of [[Corporate Expansion]] for the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. He had a daughter named [[Aarica Vost]] who also worked for the CSA.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Den of Spies|book=Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)}} {{1st}}
